items.title: Palantir vs. UiPath: Which AI-First Software Stock is a Better Buy?
items.description: PATH's global partner ecosystem and attractive valuation make it a stronger AI-driven automation bet than PLTR.

items.title: Telo raises $20 million to build tiny electric trucks for cities
items.description: The round was co-led by designer Yves Béhar and Tesla co-founder Marc Tarpenning, who helped get Telo off the ground in 2022.

items.title: Snowflake leads push to standardize metadata for AI
items.description: Fragmented definitions strain AI’s ability to ingest data. Snowflake, Salesforce and other partners are driving a joint effort to create open source standardizations.

items.title: Even if the AI bubble bursts its value will remain
items.description: GlobalData’s AI Market Opportunity Forecast predicts strong growth over the next four years at an accelerating rate.
